ns0:entry.ns0:title: HugoBlox/kit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/HugoBlox/kit
Language: html
🧱 Describe your site, AI builds it, you own it as Markdown. Snap together Tailwind blocks like Lego — landing pages, blogs, portfolios, docs & more. No AI slop. Free to deploy anywhere 👇

ns0:entry.ns0:title: f/prompts.chat
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/f/prompts.chat
Language: html
f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kananinirav/AWS-Certified-Cloud-Practitioner-Notes
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kananinirav/AWS-Certified-Cloud-Practitioner-Notes

ns0:entry.ns0:title: revfactory/harness
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/revfactory/harness
Language: html
A meta-skill that designs domain-specific agent teams, defines specialized agents, and generates the skills they use.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ringhyacinth/Star-Office-UI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ringhyacinth/Star-Office-UI
Language: html
A pixel office for your OpenClaw: turn invisible work states into a cozy little space with characters, daily notes, and guest agents. Code under MIT; art assets for non-commercial learning only.
